case_title: PATEL, RAYMOND B. vs. DIANO, RICHARD M. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAYMOND B. SERVED APR-13-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIANO, RICHARD M.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAYMOND B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIANO, RICHARD M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 909 GEARY ST #301, LEASE FORFEITED
